calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Roya Mohareri plaintiff in pro per.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Required:

Matter discussed. Per the palintiff the case was settled and the defendant filed a notice of termination. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREATER CALIFORNIA FINANCIAL COMPANY, LLC, ASSIGNEE OF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is taken under submission.

The court will prepare the order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
